name: phasemill
description: A durable Codex workflow for planning, implementation, review, project learning, and release.

interface.shortDescription: Run durable engineering and proposal-only learning workflows
interface.longDescription: Phasemill guides Codex through repository-grounded design, planning, implementation, native subagent review, independent Pi review, proposal-only project learning, and release using a restart-safe state machine.
defaultPrompt: Design and plan this change before implementation.
Execute the accepted plan and review the result.
Learn durable project guidance from this run or an explicitly named PR.
